## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (tsc + the node:test suite).
- [ ] `npm run build` is clean.
- [ ] README and `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior or the public API changed.
- [ ] **Envelope format unchanged**, OR this is an intentional `ENVELOPE_VERSION` bump explained below.
